diagrams.title: Singly Linked List Node Structure
diagrams.description: Shows the structure of a node in a singly linked list with data and next pointer fields
diagrams.purpose: Understanding basic node structure and how nodes are connected

diagrams.title: Insertion at Beginning of Linked List
diagrams.description: Step-by-step visualization of inserting a new node at the beginning of the list
elements: Final list: X -> A -> B -> C
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing pointer updates during insertion at beginning operation

diagrams.title: Insertion in Middle of Linked List
diagrams.description: Shows how to insert a node between two existing nodes in a linked list
elements: Current node C (where new will be inserted after)
diagrams.purpose: Understanding correct pointer manipulation to avoid losing list references

diagrams.title: Deletion from Linked List
diagrams.description: Visualization of deleting a node from the middle of a linked list
diagrams.purpose: Learning how to remove nodes while maintaining list continuity
